## Matriks Densitas dan Trace Tereduksi {auto-animate=true}

Untuk keadaan murni tiga qubit

$$
|\psi\rangle
=
\sum_{i_1,i_2 \cdots i_n =0}^{1}
c_{i_1,i_2 \cdots i_n}|i_1,i_2 \cdots i_n\rangle,
\qquad
\sum_{i_1,i_2 \cdots i_n=0}^{1}|c_{i_1,i_2 \cdots i_n}|^2=1,
$$

matriks densitas didefinisikan sebagai

$$
\rho=|\psi\rangle\langle\psi|.
$$

beberapa sifat properti matematis $\rho$ ini adalah

- Bersifat Hermitian,

$$
\rho^\dagger=\rho.
$$

- Memenuhi

$$
\mathrm{Tr}(\rho)=1.
$$



## Matriks Densitas Tereduksi

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

### Matriks Densitas Tereduksi Dua Qubit

Reduksi parsial menjadi 2-Qubit menghasilkan


:::{.fragment}
$$
\rho_{12} = \operatorname{Tr}_{3}(\rho)
$$

$$
\rho_{13} = \operatorname{Tr}_{2}(\rho)
$$

$$
\rho_{23} = \operatorname{Tr}_{1}(\rho)
$$
:::
:::{.fragment}
Secara eksplisit bentuk diatas adalah:
:::
:::{.fragment}
$$
\rho_{12}
=
\mathrm{Tr}_3(\rho)
=
\sum_{k=0}^{1}
(\mathbb I\otimes\mathbb I\otimes\langle k|)
\,\rho\,
(\mathbb I\otimes\mathbb I\otimes|k\rangle).
$$

$$
\rho_{13}
=
\mathrm{Tr}_2(\rho)
=
\sum_{k=0}^{1}
(\mathbb I\otimes\langle k|\otimes\mathbb I)
\,\rho\,
(\mathbb I\otimes|k\rangle\otimes\mathbb I).
$$

$$
\rho_{23}
=
\mathrm{Tr}_1(\rho)
=
\sum_{k=0}^{1}
(\langle k|\otimes\mathbb I\otimes\mathbb I)
\,\rho\,
(|k\rangle\otimes\mathbb I\otimes\mathbb I).
$$
:::
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

### Matriks Densitas Tereduksi Satu Qubit

Reduksi parsial menjadi 1-Qubit menghasilkan

:::{.fragment}
$$
\rho_{1} = \operatorname{Tr}_{23}(\rho)
$$

$$
\rho_{2} = \operatorname{Tr}_{13}(\rho)
$$

$$
\rho_{3} = \operatorname{Tr}_{12}(\rho)
$$
:::
::: {.fragment}
Secara eksplisit bentuk diatas adalah:
:::

::: {.fragment}
$$
\rho_{1} = \sum_{p=0}^{1} \sum_{q=0}^{1} (\mathbb{I} \otimes \langle p| \otimes \langle q|) \, \rho \, (\mathbb{I} \otimes |p\rangle \otimes |q\rangle)
$$

$$
\rho_{2} = \sum_{p=0}^{1} \sum_{r=0}^{1} (\langle p| \otimes \mathbb{I} \otimes \langle r|) \, \rho \, (|p\rangle \otimes \mathbb{I} \otimes |r\rangle)
$$

$$
\rho_{3} = \sum_{q=0}^{1} \sum_{r=0}^{1} (\langle q| \otimes \langle r| \otimes \mathbb{I}) \, \rho \, (|q\rangle \otimes |r\rangle \otimes \mathbb{I})
$$
:::

:::

:::
